We are running an iterative loop toward one goal: print the numbers 1, 2, 3 one per iteration, never repeating a number. This is iteration 1 — run the shell command `echo 1` and report the next number you will print. Do not print the others yet.

My next action, as dictated, is to report the subsequent number in the sequence. I'm mindful of the constraints and ready to proceed accordingly.
